notes: This registry stores source and collector metadata only. It must never store API keys or secrets.
Official or quasi-official sources anchor facts; Python packages are collectors, not final truth sources.

limitations: FRED is not a China domestic spot price source.
FRED cannot prove China inventory, warehouse receipt, spot premium, or domestic supply-demand gap.
BaoStock market data cannot prove industry fundamentals by itself.
BaoStock cannot prove product margin, resource self-sufficiency, hedging impact, or company deep research claims.
UN Comtrade data is lagged and may not match China customs local reporting exactly.
UN Comtrade cannot prove domestic inventory, spot premium, or company profit transmission by itself.
World Bank indicators are generally annual or lagged and cannot prove 1-3 month domestic nonferrous supply-demand by themselves.
World Bank macro data can support background context and score caps, not company earnings confirmation.
AKShare is a usable access provider / collector. Data collected through it may enter N57 when endpoint fields and publisher provenance are clear.
Each fact collected through AKShare must preserve sourcePublisher, accessProvider, collectorId, endpoint, field definitions, observed date, and transform notes.

deferredSources.reason: Do not parse full annual report PDF in the first phase. Store filing metadata, URL, hash, and page locator only when needed.
N57 pre-probe should test SHFE daily, settlement, warehouse receipt, and inventory access through AKShare while preserving SHFE as sourcePublisher and AKShare as accessProvider / collector.

N57 pre-probe should test international copper and related INE futures access through AKShare. If only market-feed data is available, the fact should state the market-feed publisher and claim boundary.
N57 pre-probe should test lithium carbonate and industrial silicon futures / warehouse receipt data through AKShare. Treat as candidate if not central to Dust2 nonferrous v1.
Requires authorization. Do not scrape or assume free use.
Authoritative but not treated as a low-maintenance structured API for the first phase.
Candidate local customs source for trade flow, but not scraped or assumed free in N57 pre-probe.
Candidate official annual mineral supply background source. Do not parse raw PDFs in the pre-probe.
